article.description: — Stephen Curry scored 42 points, including a game-tying 3-pointer late in regulation to help the Golden State Warriors overcome Aaron Gordon's career-high 50 points and beat the Denver Nuggets 137-131 on Thursday night.
article.headline: Stephen Curry's 42 points lift Warriors over Nuggets in thrilling 137-131 OT win

images.caption: Gary Payton II cleans up a missed 3-point attempt by Jonathan Kuminga with a dunk.
images.name: Gary Payton II rises for an electric putback dunk

article.linkText: Stephen Curry's 42 points lift Warriors over Nuggets in thrilling 137-131 OT win
article.story: SAN FRANCISCO -- — Stephen Curry scored 42 points, including a game-tying 3-pointer late in regulation to help the Golden State Warriors overcome Aaron Gordon's career-high 50 points and beat the Denver Nuggets 137-131 on Thursday night. The Warriors went on a 12-2 run in overtime that started with a corner 3-pointer from Al Horford and featured a back-breaking one from Jimmy Butler that made it 133-127 with 41 seconds to play as Golden State got off to a 2-0 start this season. Gordon broke Alex English's franchise record for a season opener of 47 points set in 1985 against Golden State. Gordon's 10 3-pointers tied Terry Rozier's record set in 2020 for the most made in a season opener. It was a dramatic end to regulation with Gordon hitting a tiebreaking 3-pointer with 25.7 seconds to play only to watch Curry tie it 4.3 seconds later with a long 3 of his own. Nikola Jokic then missed a shot in the lane just before the buzzer, sending the game to overtime, where the Warriors took control. Jokic finished with 21 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists to join Oscar Robertson as the only players with four triple-doubles in season openers. The Nuggets were the last team in the NBA to take the court in the regular season and promptly became the first team in six years to fall behind by 10-0 or worse in the opener. They quickly responded with 12 straight points of their own and didn't trail again in the half. Gordon made all seven his attempts from 3 in the first half — the most 3-pointers ever in the first half of a season opener to help Denver take a 70-61 lead at the break. Gordon matched Golden State’s output from long range in the half on 16 fewer attempts. Up next Nuggets: Host Phoenix on Saturday night. Warriors: Visit Portland on Friday night. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.caption: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Thunder enter the playoffs as the favorites to win it all.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.caption: The Lakers miss the perimeter shooting that Austin Reaves provides.
images.name: Austin Reaves [1296x729]

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

videos.description: Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: The Warriors move to 2-0 to start the NBA season thanks in part to Steph Curry's 42 points against the Nuggets.
videos.headline: Curry dazzles with 42 points as Warriors win OT thriller

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry dazzles with 42 points as Warriors win OT thriller) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic scores from his tip-toes after a nice feed from Cam Johnson.
videos.headline: Jokic tip-toes in for an easy basket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic tip-toes in for an easy basket) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephen Curry knocks down his first attempt from beyond the arc vs. the Nuggets.
videos.headline: Curry's first shot is this impressive 3-pointer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry's first shot is this impressive 3-pointer) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Christian Braun is the recipient of a beautiful pass from Nikola Jokic and finishes it off with a dunk.
videos.headline: Jokic needs only a sliver of space for this assist

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic needs only a sliver of space for this assist) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Aaron Gordon is feeling it from deep after drilling his seventh 3-pointer of the first half.
videos.headline: Gordon cashes in his seventh 3-pointer of 1st half

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gordon cashes in his seventh 3-pointer of 1st half) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Jamal Murray splits two defenders on his way to the basket for a layup.
videos.headline: Jamal Murray gets to the rim with patience

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray gets to the rim with patience) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Jonathan Kuminga improvises to get a bucket for the Warriors.
videos.headline: Kuminga uses his craftiness for a layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kuminga uses his craftiness for a layup) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephen Curry hits a catch and shoot 3-pointer to get the Warriors going.
videos.headline: Curry buries it from deep

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry buries it from deep) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephen Curry goes high off the glass to drop in the and-1 layup.
videos.headline: Curry scoops it up and in plus the foul

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry scoops it up and in plus the foul) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Jamal Murray closes the third quarter with a fortuitous 3-pointer for the Nuggets.
videos.headline: Jamal Murray gets a friendly bounce on his 3-pointer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray gets a friendly bounce on his 3-pointer) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Al Horford's corner 3-pointer gives the Warriors the lead after trailing by as much as 14 points.
videos.headline: Al Horford hits a momentous 3 for Warriors

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Al Horford hits a momentous 3 for Warriors) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam
videos.headline: Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Aaron Gordon comes up big for the Nuggets with 42 points on an 10-0 run.
videos.headline: Gordon hits 40-point mark after 4 straight buckets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gordon hits 40-point mark after 4 straight buckets) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Steph Curry ties the score for the Warriors late in the 4th quarter with a clutch 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Steph Curry shimmies after hitting game-tying 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Steph Curry shimmies after hitting game-tying 3) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Aaron Gordon makes his 10th 3-pointer of the night to put the Nuggets ahead 120-117.
videos.headline: Aaron Gordon hits a go-ahead 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Aaron Gordon hits a go-ahead 3) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Steph Curry dials one up from way downtown to send Warriors-Nuggets to overtime.
videos.headline: Curry does it again with a deep 3 to send game to OT

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry does it again with a deep 3 to send game to OT) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall
videos.headline: Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Nikola Jokic can't convert on a chance to put the Warriors away in regulation.
videos.headline: Jokic misses game-winning opportunity for Nuggets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic misses game-winning opportunity for Nuggets) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Jimmy Butler is left all alone from beyond the arc and swishes it through to extend the Warriors' lead late.
videos.headline: Jimmy Butler nails dagger 3 to seal Warriors' win in OT

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jimmy Butler nails dagger 3 to seal Warriors' win in OT) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.description: Steph Curry comes through with 16 consecutive points for the Warriors down the stretch.
videos.headline: On fire! Steph goes off for 16 straight points for Warriors

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (On fire! Steph goes off for 16 straight points for Warriors) 2025/10/24 ESHEET
